seo.description: Vibe Tracker — self-hosted task management with a Fastify API, Svelte 5 SPA, and Tauri launcher. Docker Compose deployment with CLI setup wizard.

props.title: Vibe Tracker
paragraphs: Right now I am vibe-coding the Vibe Tracker - a self-hosted open-source task management system. Tech: Fastify API backend, Drizzle ORM, a Svelte 5 single-page app.
The repository is private until MVP release.
